transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, my doctor said she'd send a referral to a dermatologist but I never got any details.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can check that for you. Can I get your name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Nathan. I see Dr. Okafor submitted a referral on Tuesday to Crestview Dermatology Group.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good. Do I need to call them myself or will they reach out?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You can call them directly to schedule, or I can transfer the referral info to their scheduling line right now if you'd like.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, please transfer it. That'd save me a step.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Done. Crestview has your referral number 88214 and should call within two business days, but you can also dial them at 555-201-3390.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Great, thank you so much for the help.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Nathan. Anything else before I let you go?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Have a good day.
